description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build that runs on push events. The workflow should have two jobs: one for Windows and one for Linux. The Windows job should run on a windows-2022 environment, check out the repository, fetch several plugins from GitHub, and then build a Visual Studio project using MSBuild. The Linux job should run on an ubuntu-22.04 environment, check out the repository, install dependencies, download 3rd-party libraries, and then build the project using gmake.
